name: Kahlua Custard Filling
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan, heat milk until just before boiling.
2. Stir in sugar.
3. Remove the sweetened milk from the heat and gradually add eggs, stirring constantly.
4. Return the mixture to low heat and stir steadily until the custard thickens.
5. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla and Kahlua.
6. Cover and allow to cool.
